title: × Schedolium brinkmannii
taxonomy: × Schedolium brinkmannii is a hybrid genus of plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is a cross between the genera Spathoglottis and Dendrobium. Further classification of × Schedolium brinkmannii can be difficult due to its hybrid nature. However, its closest relatives are typically classified as epiphytes. Further research is necessary to fully understand the classification of this hybrid orchid species.
